templates.label: ACL4SSR default
templates.useWhen: Balanced default for most users, with ad blocking, AI, media, Telegram, Apple, Microsoft, China direct, and fallback routing.

templates.label: ACL4SSR no emoji
templates.useWhen: Use when the client UI or user preference needs plain group names without emoji.

templates.label: AI and streaming
templates.useWhen: Use when AI services, streaming platforms, Telegram, and GitHub routing need explicit groups.

templates.label: Loyalsoldier whitelist
templates.useWhen: Direct-first style. Unknown traffic goes through proxy.

templates.label: Loyalsoldier blacklist
templates.useWhen: Proxy only listed domains. Unknown traffic goes direct.

templates.label: Small basic template
templates.useWhen: Smallest readable Mihomo output for debugging or heavy customization.

filters.pattern: 官网|剩余|流量|过期|到期|套餐|倍率|重置|订阅|官网|群|更新

filters.label: Only HK JP SG US

filters.pattern: 香港|港|HK|日本|东京|東京|JP|新加坡|狮城|獅城|SG|美国|美國|US|USA|洛杉矶|洛杉磯

filters.warning: Use only when the user explicitly wants to keep these regions; include filters can remove valid nodes.
